'''howavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubeolar|rubeolar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubeolar|rubeolar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| howavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:howavithi|howavithi]] || [[word:howaviji|howaviji]] || [[word:howavishi|howavishi]] || [[word:howaviki|howaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:howavuthuthu|howavuthuthu]] || [[word:howavujuju|howavujuju]] || [[word:howavushushu|howavushushu]] || [[word:howavukuku|howavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:howavuthu|howavuthu]] || [[word:howavuju|howavuju]] || [[word:howavushu|howavushu]] || [[word:howavuku|howavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:howavufthuf|howavufthuf]] || [[word:howavufjuf|howavufjuf]] || [[word:howavufshuf|howavufshuf]] || [[word:howavufkuf|howavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:howavethe|howavethe]] || [[word:howaveje|howaveje]] || [[word:howaveshe|howaveshe]] || [[word:howaveke|howaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:howavothotho|howavothotho]] || [[word:howavojojo|howavojojo]] || [[word:howavoshosho|howavoshosho]] || [[word:howavokoko|howavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:howavotho|howavotho]] || [[word:howavojo|howavojo]] || [[word:howavosho|howavosho]] || [[word:howavoko|howavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:howavofthof|howavofthof]] || [[word:howavofjof|howavofjof]] || [[word:howavofshof|howavofshof]] || [[word:howavofkof|howavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:howavÃŸfthÃŸf|howavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfjÃŸf|howavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfshÃŸf|howavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfkÃŸf|howavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:howavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|howavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|howavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|howavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|howavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:howavÃŸfthÃŸf|howavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfjÃŸf|howavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfshÃŸf|howavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfkÃŸf|howavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:howavÃŸfthÃŸf|howavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfjÃŸf|howavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfshÃŸf|howavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:howavÃŸfkÃŸf|howavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:howavÃḊthÃḊ|howavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:howavÃḊjÃḊ|howavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:howavÃḊshÃḊ|howavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:howavÃḊkÃḊ|howavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:howavathatha|howavathatha]] || [[word:howavajaja|howavajaja]] || [[word:howavashasha|howavashasha]] || [[word:howavakaka|howavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:howavatha|howavatha]] || [[word:howavaja|howavaja]] || [[word:howavasha|howavasha]] || [[word:howavaka|howavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:howavafthaf|howavafthaf]] || [[word:howavafjaf|howavafjaf]] || [[word:howavafshaf|howavafshaf]] || [[word:howavafkaf|howavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:howavasha|howavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:howavshÃḋsha|howavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:howavrosha|howavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:howavmusha|howavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:howavyasha|howavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohowavnkshÃḋsha|gohowavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohowavnkrosha|gohowavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohowavnkmusha|gohowavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohowavnkyasha|gohowavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:howawavasha|howawavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:howawavshÃḋsha|howawavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:howawavrosha|howawavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:howawavmusha|howawavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:howawavyasha|howawavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohowawavnkshÃḋsha|gohowawavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohowawavnkrosha|gohowawavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohowawavnkmusha|gohowawavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohowawavnkyasha|gohowawavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hewÃḊvasha|hewÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hewÃḊvshÃḋsha|hewÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hewÃḊvrosha|hewÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hewÃḊvmusha|hewÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hewÃḊvyasha|hewÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohewÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gohewÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohewÃḊvnkrosha|gohewÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohewÃḊvnkmusha|gohewÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohewÃḊvnkyasha|gohewÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:howfavasha|howfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:howfavshÃḋsha|howfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:howfavrosha|howfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:howfavmusha|howfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:howfavyasha|howfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohowfavnkshÃḋsha|gohowfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohowfavnkrosha|gohowfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohowfavnkmusha|gohowfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohowfavnkyasha|gohowfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
